description.ko: 끊임없이 빛나는 네온 사인과 비구름 아래에서 첨단 기술과 도시의 거친 매력이 공존하는 미래 지향적인 도시의 숨 막히는 전경입니다.
description.en: A breathtaking view of a futuristic cityscape where advanced technology and urban grit coexist under the constant glow of neon signs and rain-heavy clouds.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a sprawling cyberpunk megacity at night, glowing neon advertisements in electric blue and hot pink, flying vehicles weaving through massive skyscrapers, rain-slicked asphalt reflecting vibrant city lights, dark atmospheric fog, high-tech urban decay, ultra-detailed, 8k resolution, photorealistic futuristic aesthetic.
